affiliations.display: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司

backstory.original: Caring, motherly, and endlessly optimistic, Evelyn has adventured across the realms as part of the Waffle Crew for many years. She's always first in battle, thanks to her flying boots, and will always take a hit to protect others. Short, yet tough, her devotion to Lathander has seen her through many perilous situations.
backstory.display: 伊芙琳富有慈母般的爱心和无尽的乐观精神，多年来一直作为华夫饼小队的一员在各个王国冒险。依靠她的飞天靴，她在战斗中总是第一时间出现，并且总是会为了保护他人而承受打击。她身材矮小但坚强，凭借着对洛山达的忠诚，她解决了许多危险状况。

description.original: Evelyn smashes the front-most enemy with her enormous battleaxe. Every third attack, she cleaves all nearby enemies as well.
description.display: 伊芙琳用巨大战斧猛击最前方的敌人。每第三次攻击，她还会顺劈附近的所有敌人。

description.original: Evelyn summons her Celestial Pegasus and dashes across the battlefield.
description.display: 伊芙琳召唤她的天界飞马，冲刺穿过战场。

longDescription.original: Evelyn summons her Celestial Pegasus and dashes across the battlefield, damaging all enemies in a line for massive damage and briefly stunning all damaged enemies.
longDescription.display: 伊芙琳召唤她的天界飞马，冲刺穿过战场。对一条直线上的所有敌人造成高额伤害，并短暂眩晕所有受到伤害的敌人。

description.desc: $source increases the damage of everyone behind her in the formation by $(amount)%
$source使阵型中所有她身后的人伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Evelyn buffs all Champions behind her in the formation. Place her in front of your main damage dealers.
tipText.display: 伊芙琳为阵型中她身后的所有勇士提供增益。把她放在你的主要伤害输出前面。

description.pre: After Evelyn attacks an enemy, $(upgrade_name id) is buffed by $(not_buffed amount)% for $(buff_duration___3) seconds. If the enemy had a debuff affecting them, the effect is increased by $(amount___2)%. Does not stack.
伊芙琳攻击一名敌人，$(upgrade_name id)在 $(buff_duration___3) 秒内获得 $(not_buffed amount)% 强化。如果敌人之前已受到减益效果影响，则该效果提升 $(amount___2)%。不可堆叠。

description.desc: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)% multiplied by the highest number of enemies that $source has tanked at once in the current area plus the highest enemy enrage stack in the current area.
$(upgrade_name id)的效果提升为$source在当前区域内同时应对的敌人最大数量和当前区域内敌人最高激怒堆叠层数的 $(amount)%。
Increases the Health of all other Champions by $amount% of $source's Max Health
提高所有其他勇士的生命值，数值相当于$source最大生命值的 $amount%。
After an ally effectively heals $source, Divine Prayer is buffed by $amount% for 15 seconds.
当一名盟友对$source进行有效回复后，神圣祈祷在 15 秒内获得 $amount% 强化。

Every Champion in the formation grants Evelyn Grace stacks for every $num_levels_per_stack___2 levels above their last unlockable upgrade that they are leveled. Each Grace stack increases the effect of Divine Prayer by $(amount)%, stacking multiplicatively. Champions can contribute at most 1 Grace stack each for every $num_areas_per_stack___2 areas completed in the current adventure.
与上一个可解锁进阶相比，阵型中每位勇士每提升 $num_levels_per_stack___2 个等级，均为伊芙琳提供一层“恩典”堆叠。每层“恩典”均使“神圣祈祷”的效果提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。在当前冒险中每完成 $num_areas_per_stack___2 个区域，勇士最多可以提供 1 层“恩典”。

tipText.original: Evelyn is a late-game tank who provides additional buffs for the formation beyond the soft cap.
tipText.display: 伊芙琳是一位游戏后期的坦克，她能为阵型提供超过软上限的额外增益效果。

description.desc: After an ally of $source is attacked by an enemy, Divine Prayer is buffed by $amount% for 15 seconds.
当$source的一名盟友被敌人攻击时，神圣祈祷在 15 秒内获得 $amount% 强化。

specializationDescription.original: Evelyn's Prayer grows more powerful when the formation comes under attack.
specializationDescription.display: 当阵型受到攻击时，伊芙琳的祈祷会变得更加强大。

description.desc: After $source attacks an Enemy that has recently attacked them, Divine Prayer is buffed by $amount% for 15 seconds
$source攻击一名最近攻击过自己的敌人后，神圣祈祷在 15 秒内获得 $amount% 强化

specializationDescription.original: When Evelyn retaliates against an enemy who recently attacked her, her Prayer's power grows.
specializationDescription.display: 当伊芙琳对最近袭击她的敌人进行报复时，她的祈祷力量就会增强。

description.desc: The effect of the bonus upgrades granted by Lathander's Grace is increased by $(amount)% (stacking additively and then applying multiplicatively) for each Acquisitions Incorporated, The "C" Team, or Waffle Crew Champion in the formation.
阵型中的每位艾奎兹玄有限责任公司、“C”小队或华夫饼小队勇士均使“洛山达的恩典”给予的加成进阶效果提高 $(amount)%（以加算方式堆叠并以乘算方式生效）。

specializationDescription.original: Evelyn's late game ability is increased with more of her affiliated allies in the formation.
specializationDescription.display: 伊芙琳的后期游戏技能随着她在阵型中附属盟友数量的增加而提高。

description.display: 洛山达将真正指引我们！

description.original: The armor of the light can not be broken!
You think I'm scared? You don't know me.
description.display: 你以为我害怕了？那是你不了解我。

description.original: Lathander shall see me through this.
description.display: 洛山达会助我度过这个难关。

description.original: Feel that? A new dawn rises within us all!
description.display: 感觉到了吗？新的黎明正在我们的内心中觉醒！

description.original: Thank the Morninglord, that thing wasn't a mimic!
description.display: 感谢晨曦之主，那东西不是拟形怪！

description.original: The Morninglord grant us his wisdom!
description.display: 晨曦之主将智慧授予了我们！

description.original: Give me an L! Give me an A! Give me a --
description.display: 跟我喊“洛”！跟我喊“山”！跟我喊--

description.original: That was great! Now let's do that 400 more times, and it will be perfect!
description.display: 棒极了！接下来再做 400 次，这样就完美了！

description.original: That's right -- I called you a jerk!
Did you heal me? OH! Yay! We're best friends now!
description.display: 你治疗我了？哦！耶！我们现在是死党了！

description.original: Uh oh -- more enemies! Everyone get behind me!
description.display: 啊哦，又是敌人！大家都躲到我背后！

description.original: Lathander guides my path, my sword, my heart.
description.display: 洛山达指引我的路、我的剑、我的心。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Caring, motherly, and endlessly optimistic, Evelyn has adventured across the realms as part of the Waffle Crew for many years. She's always first in battle, thanks to her flying boots, and will always take a hit to protect others. Short, yet tough, her devotion to Lathander has seen her through many perilous situations.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Evelyn's place is at the front of the party. She tanks damage like a champ and buffs the party based on that skill.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 伊芙琳富有慈母般的爱心和无尽的乐观精神，多年来一直作为华夫饼小队的一员在各个王国冒险。依靠她的飞天靴，她在战斗中总是第一时间出现，并且总是会为了保护他人而承受打击。她身材矮小但坚强，凭借着对洛山达的忠诚，她解决了许多危险状况。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 伊芙琳最适合位于队伍前方。她像勇士一样承受伤害，并使用技能为团队提供增益。
